prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 96.6 kg; Height 168.3 cm; BMI 34.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 7.1%), FPG (12 months ago 244mg/dL; 9 months ago 205mg/dL; 6 months ago 218mg/dL; 3 months ago 203mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 97.2kg; 9 months ago 100.2kg; 6 months ago 96.1kg; 3 months ago 95.7kg; current 96.6kg), Height (12 months ago 168.3cm; 9 months ago 168.3cm; 6 months ago 168.3cm; 3 months ago 168.3cm; current 168.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 35.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 34.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 35U/L; 9 months ago 35U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 32U/L), AST (12 months ago 8U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 74mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; current 74mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 15mg/g; 9 months ago 16mg/g; 6 months ago 16mg/g; 3 months ago 15mg/g; current 18mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 58mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 155mg/dL; 9 months ago 150mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 149mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.8g/dL; 9 months ago 13.6g/dL; 6 months ago 13.6g/dL; 3 months ago 13.7g/dL; current 14.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
